queries.question: Show all employees of Derek Brown from the construction workers and electricians.
queries.sql:
SELECT Construction_Workers.name
FROM Construction_Workers
WHERE Construction_Workers.company_owner = "Derek Brown"
UNION
SELECT Electricians.name
FROM Electricians
WHERE Electricians.company_owner = "Derek Brown"

queries.question: Show me all the construction workers listed and also just those electricians who work for Derek Brown.
queries.sql:
SELECT Construction_Workers.name
FROM Construction_Workers
UNION
SELECT Electricians.name
FROM Electricians
WHERE Electricians.company_owner = "Derek Brown"

ambiguous_dsl.question: Provide all construction workers and electricians who work for Derek Brown.
